description_long: This is a large, modern bungalow surrounded by a dense perimeter of tall, conical evergreen trees, creating a private enclosure. The main building features a stone facade with a mix of large and small rectangular windows, and a prominent central entrance with a decorative pathway leading up to it. The property includes a detached garage with a red-tiled hip roof, situated to one side of the main house. The backyard area is landscaped with garden beds, a patio, and outdoor seating, while the front yard is neatly organized with a stone walkway and symmetrical plantings. The roof of the bungalow is flat with parapet walls, and the overall layout is spacious, with clear separation between living and utility spaces. The architectural style blends modern and traditional elements, emphasizing symmetry and clean lines.
description: A spacious, modern bungalow with a stone facade, flat roof, and a detached red-roofed garage, all enclosed by tall evergreen trees. The property features landscaped gardens, a central entrance, and a private, symmetrical layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical facade, central pathway, and detached garage to the left.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard garden, patio area, and the garage roof behind the house.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the stone exterior, window arrangement, and the full enclosure of trees.
description_view_3: Angled view from the garage side, showing the side of the bungalow, garden beds, and the garage's proximity.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
